author: kevaundray
content: question asked by <@411317441688371202>  to <@1369712771683319879>  on the breakout call

author: dhsorens_26042
content: EVMYulLean is a strong first choice for use as a formal spec. some blockers include that it's not fully up to date. a more subtle reason is that it was a spec designed for smart contract verification and there are some aspects of evm-asm that need a more robust spec (relating to the STF/global state etc) that may not make it a very good guest program spec, as it stands

author: dhsorens_26042
content: Francesco's EL-IR is very interesting to me as a formal spec language and it might be nicer over the long run
